“One dimensional” describes all of Kuang’s characters in every single book. She has interesting ideas, but her characters end up just being exposition dumps. Worse, in Babel she constantly  interrupts the flow to give yet another polemic against imperialism. She preaches to the choir so much I just can’t read any more of her books. Perhaps after she gets out of her bubble, gets some life experience, and learns how to write humanity into her characters.
According to the census data, the population grew by 2.3% last year. Most of the growth was in suburban areas.

accuracy.description: Exact match between predicted and expected label

format_compliance.description: Model responds with exactly one of: Positive, Negative, Neutral (no extra text)

neutral_precision.description: Ability to distinguish neutral comments from positive/negative — the main weakness in baseline
neutral_precision.baseline: 2/3 neutral correct (model classified 1 neutral as positive)
neutral_precision.measurement: correctly predicted neutrals / total actual neutrals

consistency.description: Same input produces same output across multiple runs (temperature=0)
